person.alternateName: Sir Henry HOWARD Earl of Surrey

memoryArtifacts.headline: King Henry VII
memoryArtifacts.description:
Death and burial

Surrey's tomb
Henry VIII, consumed by paranoia and increasing illness, became convinced that Surrey had planned to usurp the crown from his son Edward. The King had Surrey imprisoned—with his father—sentenced to death on 13 January 1547, and beheaded for treason on 19 January 1547 (his father survived impending execution only by it being set for the day after the king happened to die, though he remained imprisoned). Surrey's son Thomas became heir to the Dukedom of Norfolk instead, inheriting it on the 3rd Duke's death in 1554.

He is buried in a spectacular painted alabaster tomb in the church of St Michael the Archangel, Framlingham.
Coat of arms of Sir Henry Howard, styled Earl of Surrey, KG

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke於1517年1月19日出生在英國賀特福爾時，他的父親Thomas Howard 3rd Duke of Norfolk44歲，母親Elizabeth Stafford19歲。他於1531年2月13日與Frances de Vere在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1547年1月19日在英國倫敦享年30歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可福拉苗林加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke于1517年1月19日出生在英国賀特福爾时，他的父亲Thomas Howard 3rd Duke of Norfolk44岁，母亲Elizabeth Stafford19岁。他于1531年2月13日与Frances de Vere在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1547年1月19日在英国倫敦享年30岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可福拉苗林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke was born on 19 January 1517, in Hertfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Howard 3rd Duke of Norfolk, was 44 and his mother, Elizabeth Stafford, was 19. He married Frances de Vere on 13 February 1531, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 19 January 1547, in London, England, at the age of 30, and was buried in Framlingham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke est né le 19 janvier 1517, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Howard 3rd Duke of Norfolk, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stafford, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Frances de Vere le 13 février 1531, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 19 janvier 1547, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Framlingham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke am 19. Januar 1517 in Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Howard 3rd Duke of Norfolk 44 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Stafford 19. Er hat am 13. Februar 1531 in England, United Kingdom Frances de Vere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Januar 1547 im Alter von 30 Jahren in London, England und wurde in Framlingham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke è nato il il 19 gennaio 1517 nel Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Howard 3rd Duke of Norfolk, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Stafford, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Frances de Vere il 13 febbraio 1531, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 gennaio 1547, nel London, England, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Framlingham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Dukeが1517年1月19日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Howard 3rd Duke of Norfolkは44歳，母Elizabeth Staffordは19歳であった。1531年2月13日にイギリスイギリスでFrances de Vereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1547年1月19日にイギリスロンドンで30歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクフラムリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke(이)가 1517년 1월 19일 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Howard 3rd Duke of Norfolk(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stafford(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1531년 2월 13일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Frances de Vere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 1월 19일 영국 런던에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프램링함에 묻혔다.

pt.19 Jan 1517–19 January 1547: 19 de janeiro de 1517–19 de janeiro de 1547
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke nasceu em 19 de janeiro de 1517, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Howard 3rd Duke of Norfolk, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stafford, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Frances de Vere em 13 de fevereiro de 1531, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de janeiro de 1547, em London, Inglaterra, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Framlingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke родился 19 января 1517 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Howard 3rd Duke of Norfolk было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stafford, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Frances de Vere 13 февраля 1531 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 19 января 1547 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности фрамлингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.19 Jan 1517–19 January 1547: 19 de enero de 1517–19 de enero de 1547
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke nació el 19 de enero de 1517, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Howard 3rd Duke of Norfolk, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stafford, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Frances de Vere el 13 de febrero de 1531, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de enero de 1547, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Framlingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
